II/21022/9C1 )/2008-i^?r.#.3TRTi.-lII] «ft. ^t. ^ . ?mf, u'^w ^^f^ MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th June, 2011 S.0.1433(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-clause (ii) of clause (j) of sub-section (1) of Section 2 of the Foreign Contribution (Regulation) Act, 20.1,0, the Central Government hereby specifies that the following international organisation shall not be treated as foreign source for the purposes of the said Act:— "Global Development Network" [F. No. II/21022/9(1 )/2008-FCRA-Iirj GV.V.
